features: FAST AND EFFICIENT TRANSFER OPTIONS - Seamlessly migrate your PC with Laplink’s PCmover, featuring download instructions for PCmover plus an optional Ethernet transfer cable. Now includes Wi-Fi Direct for faster connections. One license allows unlimited transfer attempts from one source to one destination computer; additional licenses are required for more PCs.

AI-ASSISTED TRANSFER INSIGHTS - PCmover’s AI Assistant generates a clear summary of transferable items, lets you ask questions, make adjustments, and recommends the best options for your migration. Enjoy a personalized, interactive setup experience that guides you step-by-step.

MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE AND RELIABILITY - Get speed and efficiency with PCmover’s optimized transfer methods, including new AI and Wi-Fi Direct to ensure the fastest, smoothest connection possible. Say goodbye to long wait times and start using your new PC right away.

COMPLETE SELECTIVITY FOR CUSTOMIZED TRANSFERS - Enjoy full control with PCmover’s selectivity feature. Choose specific applications, files, folders, and settings to transfer for a tailored experience. With the option to "undo" changes, PCmover makes it easy to fine-tune your migration to fit your preferences.

SEAMLESS COMPATIBILITY ACROSS WINDOWS VERSIONS - Easily transfer data between Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8.1, 8, 10, and Windows 11. PCmover’s comprehensive compatibility ensures reliability across platforms, so your data arrives exactly as it should.
description: Product Description PCmover Professional is the ONLY software that automatically moves your applications, files, settings , and even user profiles from an old PC to a new one, or old operating system to a new one. Because most transferred applications are installed ready-to-use on the new PC, there’s usually no need to find old CDs or previously downloaded programs. Easy To Use PCmover makes upgrading to a new PC effortless. Install it on both computers, follow the simple setup, and start the transfer. PCmover handles the rest. With AI-assisted guidance and Wi-Fi Direct, migration is faster and more intuitive, ensuring a seamless transition without the hassle of reinstalling programs or adjusting settings. Keep Everything Enjoy complete control over your PC transfer with PCmover’s selective transfer feature. Choose specific applications, files, folders, and settings to transfer for a tailored experience. Whether you want to move everything or just the essentials, PCmover ensures your new PC is set up exactly how you want it. Easy “Undo” Feature Quickly reverse changes made to your New PC. Whether changing your mind or redoing transfers, PCmover simplifies the process, ensuring a smooth and stress-free transfer. The easy "undo" feature provides peace of mind, allowing you to revert changes effortlessly without starting over. Free Transfer Assistance Includes 24/7 free transfer assistance to guide you through the process. Expert transfer support is just a call away, ensuring a hassle-free experience from start to finish. Whether you need help troubleshooting or have questions about your transfer, Laplink’s dedicated support team is available to assist you at no extra cost. Fast and Easy PC Transfer PCmover Professional is the easiest way to restore or move to a new PC without leaving anything behind, even when there are different versions of Windows on the old and new PC. Nothing is changed on the old PC and nothing is overwritten on the new PC. PCmover is fully compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and Windows 11. AI Assisted Transfers with Smart Connection Technology PCmover’s AI Assistant simplifies your transfer by generating a clear summary of transferable items, answering your questions, and guiding you step by step. Enjoy a personalized, interactive setup that helps you make informed decisions about what to move. PCmover's intelligent AI process determines the best connection for data transfer, including a new Wi-Fi Direct connection type, and connects PCs using the fastest method detected. Get up and running on your new PC with zero hassle . About Laplink For over 40 years, Laplink Software has been committed to simplifying PC migrations with reliable, user-friendly tools. We prioritize customer experience through responsive support, including free 24/7 transfer assistance. Trusted by Microsoft, Intel, and top PC brands, our solutions ensure smooth, secure data transfers. Our mission is to make technology easier for everyone—because we care about your time, your data, and your peace of mind. PCmover Professional Upgrade Your PC Without Losing Data Seamlessly transfer everything to your new PC with Laplink’s PCmover. Included are instructions for PCmover, plus an optional transfer cable. One PCmover license allows unlimited transfer attempts from one source to one destination computer; additional licenses are required for more PCs. Simple setup wizard - set it and forget it! Transfer everything you choose Transfer applications & cloud directories Automatic PC discovery & connection Modify library folder destinations Enhanced transfer speeds Foolproof "undo" feature Includes Free Transfer Assistance PCmover Professional 11 Ethernet Edition PCmover Professional 11 USB 3.0 Edition PCmover Professional 11 Thunderbolt Edition Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 496 4.0 out of 5 stars 496 4.0 out of 5 stars 496 Price £41.95 £ 41 . 95 £59.95 £ 59 . 95 £77.95 £ 77 . 95 Includes PCmover Software ✓ ✓ ✓ Includes Optional High Speed Transfer Cable Yes, Ethernet (uses RJ45 Port) Yes, USB 3.0 (uses USB Type A Port) Yes, Thunderbolt 4 (uses USB Type C Port) Cable Supported Transfer Speed 1 Gbps 5 Gbps 40 Gbps Transfers applications, files and settings ✓ ✓ ✓ Application Selectivity ✓ ✓ ✓ Folder Selectivity ✓ ✓ ✓ Undo Feature ✓ ✓ ✓ Rescue hard drive contents from non-working PC ✓ ✓ ✓ Restore old PC image to new Operating System ✓ ✓ ✓
